meaning: adj.同一的,相同的,无变化的,上述的,所谓 pron.同样的事物adv.同样地
examples: Mario said the very same thing.
I keep making the same mistakes.
We're booked on the same flight.
The broad message is the same, even if it is a slightly larger contraction than expected.
The disappointing export figures, however, were partly offset by strong investment data released the same day.
